paragraphs.source: Groq’s first and only publicly announced LPU architecture was detailed in their ISCA 2020 paper. Unlike typical hardware architectures connecting many general-purpose cores, Groq re-organized the architecture into groups of single-purpose units connecting to other groups of different purposes, and they named the groups “slices.” Between functional units are streaming registers, scratchpad SRAM for functional units to pass data to each other. Groq opted for single-level scratchpad SRAM instead of multi-level memory hierarchy to make the hardware execution deterministic.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Groq’s first and only publicly announced LPU architecture was detailed in their ISCA 2020 paper. Unlike typical hardware architectures connecting many general-purpose cores, Groq re-organized the architecture into groups of single-purpose units connecting to other groups of different purposes, and they named the groups “slices.” Between functional units are streaming registers, scratchpad SRAM for functional units to pass data to each other. Groq opted for single-level scratchpad SRAM instead of multi-level memory hierarchy to make the hardware execution deterministic.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Groq’s first and only publicly announced LPU architecture was detailed in their ISCA 2020 paper. Unlike typical hardware architectures connecting many general-purpose cores, Groq re-organized the architecture into groups of single-purpose units connecting to other groups of different purposes, and they named the groups “slices.” Between functional units are streaming registers, scratchpad SRAM for functional units to pass data to each other. Groq opted for single-level scratchpad SRAM instead of multi-level memory hierarchy to make the hardware execution deterministic.

pro.text: Groq 首个且唯一公开宣布的 LPU 架构在其 ISCA 2020 论文中得到了详细阐述。与连接众多通用核心的典型硬件架构不同，Groq 将架构重新组织为多组单用途单元，这些单元与其他不同用途的单元组相连，他们将这些组命名为“切片（slices）”。在功能单元之间是流式寄存器（streaming registers）和便笺式SRAM，用于功能单元之间相互传递数据。Groq 选择了单层便笺式SRAM而非多层内存层级结构，以确保硬件执行的确定性。

applied_terms: Technical terminology must be precise: 'streaming registers' (流式寄存器), 'scratchpad SRAM' (便笺式SRAM/暂存器), 'tape out' (流片), 'C2C SerDes' (芯片间串行器/解串器).

understanding.role_in_article: Details the historical and technical evolution of Groq's LPU architecture to explain what exactly Nvidia has productized.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Shifts the focus from the business rationale of the Groq deal to the specific hardware architecture of the acquired IP.
understanding.relation_to_next: Introduces the concept of 'scratchpad SRAM', which directly sets up the need to explain memory hierarchy in the subsequent section.
key_points: LPU relies on single-purpose units ('slices') and scratchpad SRAM rather than general-purpose cores.
Gen 1 was built on a mature 14nm node to prove the architecture.
Gen 2 failed due to C2C SerDes speed issues.
Gen 3 is the version Nvidia is bringing to market.
translation_notes: Technical terminology must be precise: 'streaming registers' (流式寄存器), 'scratchpad SRAM' (便笺式SRAM/暂存器), 'tape out' (流片), 'C2C SerDes' (芯片间串行器/解串器).

issues.description: 提示词在“本章翻译注意点”中明确要求将 'scratchpad SRAM' 翻译为“便笺式SRAM/暂存器”，但译文将其处理为了“暂存SRAM”。
原文表达的是三星代工厂当时在先进制程上找不到客户，且“未能分到AI逻辑芯片客户的一杯羹 / 缺乏AI逻辑芯片客户”。译文“错失了 AI 逻辑芯片客户”容易让人误解为三星弄丢了某个具体的已有客户或特定订单。

paragraphs.source: Concretely, LPU architecture has VXM slices for vector operations, MEM slices for loading/storing data, SXM slices for tensor shape manipulation, and MXM slices for performing matrix multiplication. Spatially, the slices are laid out horizontally, allowing the data to stream horizontally. Within a slice, instructions are pumped vertically across units. Conceptually, LPU resembles a systolic array that pumps instructions vertically and data horizontally.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Concretely, LPU architecture has VXM slices for vector operations, MEM slices for loading/storing data, SXM slices for tensor shape manipulation, and MXM slices for performing matrix multiplication. Spatially, the slices are laid out horizontally, allowing the data to stream horizontally. Within a slice, instructions are pumped vertically across units. Conceptually, LPU resembles a systolic array that pumps instructions vertically and data horizontally.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Concretely, LPU architecture has VXM slices for vector operations, MEM slices for loading/storing data, SXM slices for tensor shape manipulation, and MXM slices for performing matrix multiplication. Spatially, the slices are laid out horizontally, allowing the data to stream horizontally. Within a slice, instructions are pumped vertically across units. Conceptually, LPU resembles a systolic array that pumps instructions vertically and data horizontally.

pro.text: 具体而言，LPU 架构包含用于向量运算的 VXM 切片、用于加载/存储数据的 MEM 切片、用于张量形状操作的 SXM 切片，以及用于执行矩阵乘法的 MXM 切片。在空间上，这些切片呈水平布局，允许数据水平流动。在切片内部，指令跨单元垂直泵送。从概念上看，LPU 类似于一个垂直泵送指令、水平泵送数据的脉动阵列（systolic array）。

paragraphs.source: The data flow and instruction flow design requires fine-grained pipelining to achieve high performance. Since LPU architecture makes computation deterministic, the compiler can aggressively schedule and overlap instructions to hide latency. The LPU’s use of high bandwidth SRAM and aggressive pipelining are the two main factors that enable LPU’s low latency.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The data flow and instruction flow design requires fine-grained pipelining to achieve high performance. Since LPU architecture makes computation deterministic, the compiler can aggressively schedule and overlap instructions to hide latency. The LPU’s use of high bandwidth SRAM and aggressive pipelining are the two main factors that enable LPU’s low latency.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The data flow and instruction flow design requires fine-grained pipelining to achieve high performance. Since LPU architecture makes computation deterministic, the compiler can aggressively schedule and overlap instructions to hide latency. The LPU’s use of high bandwidth SRAM and aggressive pipelining are the two main factors that enable LPU’s low latency.

pro.text: 数据流和指令流的设计需要细粒度的流水线操作以实现高性能。由于 LPU 架构使计算具有确定性，编译器可以激进地调度和重叠指令以隐藏延迟。LPU 对高带宽 SRAM 的使用和激进的流水线设计，是实现 LPU 低延迟的两个主要因素。

paragraphs.source: LPU gen 1 was designed on a legacy Global Foundries 14nm process, with Marvell responsible for the chip’s physical design. This was a much more mature node compared to peers when it taped out in 2020, with the incumbent AI chip platforms mostly on TSMC’s N7 platform. This made sense for an early product focused on proving out Groq’s architecture and bringing its inference-centric design to market. The 14nm node was mature, relatively well understood, and suitable for an initial chip where architectural differentiation mattered more than pushing its silicon to the leading edge.

This was a much more mature node compared to peers when it taped out in 2020, with the incumbent AI chip platforms mostly on TSMC’s N7 platform. This made sense for an early product focused on proving out Groq’s architecture and bringing its inference-centric design to market. The 14nm node was mature, relatively well understood, and suitable for an initial chip where architectural differentiation mattered more than pushing its silicon to the leading edge.

This made sense for an early product focused on proving out Groq’s architecture and bringing its inference-centric design to market. The 14nm node was mature, relatively well understood, and suitable for an initial chip where architectural differentiation mattered more than pushing its silicon to the leading edge.

pro.text: 第一代 LPU 基于传统的格芯（GlobalFoundries）14nm 制程节点设计，由 Marvell 负责芯片的物理设计。当其在 2020 年流片时，与同行相比这是一个成熟得多的制程节点，当时主流的 AI 芯片平台大多采用台积电（TSMC）的 N7 平台。对于一款专注于验证 Groq 架构并将其以推理为中心的设计推向市场的早期产品而言，这是合理的选择。14nm 制程节点已经成熟、相对容易被理解，并且适合用于初始芯片，因为在这一阶段，架构差异化比将硅片推向最前沿制程更为重要。

paragraphs.source: One of the selling points is that the chip can be manufactured and packaged entirely in the United States compared to their competitors being heavily reliant on the Asia semiconductor supply chain: logic and packaging in Taiwan, with HBM from Korea.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: One of the selling points is that the chip can be manufactured and packaged entirely in the United States compared to their competitors being heavily reliant on the Asia semiconductor supply chain: logic and packaging in Taiwan, with HBM from Korea.

pro.text: 其卖点之一是，该芯片可以完全在美国本土制造和封装，相比之下，其竞争对手则严重依赖亚洲半导体供应链：逻辑芯片和封装在台湾地区完成，而 HBM 则来自韩国。

paragraphs.source: Since then, Groq’s roadmap has stalled due to execution, with no LPU 2 having been shipped. This leaves the Groq LPU looking even more dated against competing roadmaps. What was once a meaningful but still manageable node disadvantage versus 7nm-era peers has widened into a far sharper gap, with all leading accelerator platforms now moving onto 3nm-class processes in 2026.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Since then, Groq’s roadmap has stalled due to execution, with no LPU 2 having been shipped. This leaves the Groq LPU looking even more dated against competing roadmaps. What was once a meaningful but still manageable node disadvantage versus 7nm-era peers has widened into a far sharper gap, with all leading accelerator platforms now moving onto 3nm-class processes in 2026.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Since then, Groq’s roadmap has stalled due to execution, with no LPU 2 having been shipped. This leaves the Groq LPU looking even more dated against competing roadmaps. What was once a meaningful but still manageable node disadvantage versus 7nm-era peers has widened into a far sharper gap, with all leading accelerator platforms now moving onto 3nm-class processes in 2026.

pro.text: 自那以后，由于执行问题，Groq 的路线图停滞不前，至今未出货第二代 LPU（LPU 2）。这使得 Groq LPU 在与竞争对手路线图的对比中显得更加过时。与 7nm 时代的同行相比，曾经显著但仍可控的制程节点劣势已经扩大为更为悬殊的差距，如今所有领先的加速器平台都将在 2026 年迈向 3nm 级制程。

paragraphs.source: The follow on Groq LPU 2 was designed for Samsung Foundry’s SF4X node, specifically at Samsung’s Austin fab, allowing them to extend the pitch that Groq is fabricated domestically in the USA. Samsung would also provide support for the back-end design. The choice of Samsung was driven by favorable terms / investment, with Samsung Foundry struggling to find customers for its advanced nodes and missing out on an AI logic customer. Unsurprisingly, Samsung was a key investor in Groq’s subsequent Series D in August 2024, and most recently in September 2025 before the Nvidia “acquisition.”
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The follow on Groq LPU 2 was designed for Samsung Foundry’s SF4X node, specifically at Samsung’s Austin fab, allowing them to extend the pitch that Groq is fabricated domestically in the USA. Samsung would also provide support for the back-end design. The choice of Samsung was driven by favorable terms / investment, with Samsung Foundry struggling to find customers for its advanced nodes and missing out on an AI logic customer. Unsurprisingly, Samsung was a key investor in Groq’s subsequent Series D in August 2024, and most recently in September 2025 before the Nvidia “acquisition.”
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The follow on Groq LPU 2 was designed for Samsung Foundry’s SF4X node, specifically at Samsung’s Austin fab, allowing them to extend the pitch that Groq is fabricated domestically in the USA. Samsung would also provide support for the back-end design. The choice of Samsung was driven by favorable terms / investment, with Samsung Foundry struggling to find customers for its advanced nodes and missing out on an AI logic customer. Unsurprisingly, Samsung was a key investor in Groq’s subsequent Series D in August 2024, and most recently in September 2025 before the Nvidia “acquisition.”

pro.text: 后续的 Groq LPU 2 专为三星（Samsung）晶圆代工厂（foundry）的 SF4X 制程节点设计，具体在三星的奥斯汀晶圆厂（fab）生产，这使得他们能够延续 Groq 在美国本土制造的宣传口径。三星还为其提供后端设计支持。选择三星是出于其提供的优惠条款与投资，当时三星晶圆代工厂正难以为其先进制程节点寻找客户，且一直未能斩获 AI 逻辑芯片客户。毫不意外，三星是 Groq 随后在 2024 年 8 月 D 轮融资中的主要投资者，最近一次投资则发生在 2025 年 9 月英伟达“收购”之前。

applied_terms: Technical terminology must be precise: 'streaming registers' (流式寄存器), 'scratchpad SRAM' (便笺式SRAM/暂存器), 'tape out' (流片), 'C2C SerDes' (芯片间串行器/解串器).

understanding.role_in_article: Details the historical and technical evolution of Groq's LPU architecture to explain what exactly Nvidia has productized.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Shifts the focus from the business rationale of the Groq deal to the specific hardware architecture of the acquired IP.
understanding.relation_to_next: Introduces the concept of 'scratchpad SRAM', which directly sets up the need to explain memory hierarchy in the subsequent section.
key_points: LPU relies on single-purpose units ('slices') and scratchpad SRAM rather than general-purpose cores.
Gen 1 was built on a mature 14nm node to prove the architecture.
Gen 2 failed due to C2C SerDes speed issues.
Gen 3 is the version Nvidia is bringing to market.
translation_notes: Technical terminology must be precise: 'streaming registers' (流式寄存器), 'scratchpad SRAM' (便笺式SRAM/暂存器), 'tape out' (流片), 'C2C SerDes' (芯片间串行器/解串器).

issues.description: 提示词在“本章翻译注意点”中明确要求将 'scratchpad SRAM' 翻译为“便笺式SRAM/暂存器”，但译文将其处理为了“暂存SRAM”。
原文表达的是三星代工厂当时在先进制程上找不到客户，且“未能分到AI逻辑芯片客户的一杯羹 / 缺乏AI逻辑芯片客户”。译文“错失了 AI 逻辑芯片客户”容易让人误解为三星弄丢了某个具体的已有客户或特定订单。

paragraphs.source: However, the Groq LPU 2 was never productized because of design issues. The C2C SerDes on the chip couldn’t hit the advertised 112G speed which caused the design to malfunction, as we detailed long ago in the Accelerator model. The third generation Groq LPU is the one that Nvidia will be productizing.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: However, the Groq LPU 2 was never productized because of design issues. The C2C SerDes on the chip couldn’t hit the advertised 112G speed which caused the design to malfunction, as we detailed long ago in the [Accelerator model](https://semianalysis.com/accelerator-hbm-model/). The third generation Groq LPU is the one that Nvidia will be productizing.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: However, the Groq LPU 2 was never productized because of design issues. The C2C SerDes on the chip couldn’t hit the advertised 112G speed which caused the design to malfunction, as we detailed long ago in the Accelerator model. The third generation Groq LPU is the one that Nvidia will be productizing.

pro.text: 然而，由于设计问题，Groq LPU 2 从未实现产品化。芯片上的芯片间串行器/解串器（C2C SerDes）无法达到宣传的 112G 速率，导致该设计出现故障，正如我们早前在加速器模型中所详述的那样。第三代 Groq LPU 才是英伟达将要产品化的版本。
pro.tokenized_text: 然而，由于设计问题，Groq LPU 2 从未实现产品化。芯片上的芯片间串行器/解串器（C2C SerDes）无法达到宣传的 112G 速率，导致该设计出现故障，正如我们早前在[[[LINK_1|加速器模型]]]中所详述的那样。第三代 Groq LPU 才是英伟达将要产品化的版本。

applied_terms: Technical terminology must be precise: 'streaming registers' (流式寄存器), 'scratchpad SRAM' (便笺式SRAM/暂存器), 'tape out' (流片), 'C2C SerDes' (芯片间串行器/解串器).
